overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a misty grassland with wildflowers. A horse rider briefly passes by on the dirt trail as the character approaches and passes a distinctive dead tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland meadow with wildflowers and distant tree line

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through the grassy meadow toward the distant hills

entered.detail: lush green grass with scattered yellow wildflowers covering the ground
narrow dirt path winding through the meadow
dense tree line marking the edge of the meadow with autumn-colored foliage
rolling green hills visible in the background under overcast sky
tall dead tree with bare branches becoming visible on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a dirt trail through an open grassland meadow. The landscape features lush green grass with yellow wildflowers, a distant tree line, and rolling hills under an overcast sky. A distinctive dead tree becomes visible on the left as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside near dead tree landmark

events.description: horse rider passes by on the trail from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as a horse rider passes by from behind

notable_agents.action: riding a horse along the trail, passing the ego character from behind and moving ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the trail as the dead tree grows larger on the left. A horse rider suddenly appears from the right and passes by on the trail. The character walks past the dead tree, which stands prominently beside the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail moving away from tree

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail moving away from the dead tree toward the distant forest

segments.scene_description: Having passed the dead tree, the character continues along the dirt trail through the open meadow. The dead tree falls behind and out of view as the character moves toward the distant forest line under the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail through a lush grassland meadow that leads toward a distant forest line. It begins with the character walking steadily through green grass and yellow wildflowers under an overcast sky, as a distinctive dead tree gradually emerges on the left. As the character approaches the tree, a horse rider suddenly appears from the right and passes by on the trail. The scene then shifts as the character moves past the prominent dead tree, leaving it behind in the wake of their steady pace. Finally, the camera continues forward through the open meadow, with the dead tree falling out of view as the character advances toward the far tree line.
